economic_notes: Band has interests in Kinbasket Development Corporation, Kinbasket Water & Sewer Company Ltd., Kinbasket Property Development Corporation, Kenpesq't Holdings Ltd. (consolidated). Also holds modified equity interests in SEM Holdings Ltd. (20%), Kenpesq't Limited Partnership (99.99%), Kenpesq't GP Ltd. (100%). In July 2022, Band loaned $1,000,000 to a company it holds a 20% interest in.
notes: Audit is qualified on three bases: (1) financial information for SEM Holdings Ltd. and North Rock Holdings not available, including a $600,000 advance from an unrelated third party that may not be collectable; (2) sub-leased land rights in tangible capital assets carried at fair value not in accordance with PSAS; (3) deferred revenue includes appraisal increase on sub-leased land rights of $2,386,467 not in accordance with PSAS. Prior period adjustment of $674,397 to restate fiscal 2021 figures. Four entities fully consolidated; three entities accounted for by modified equity method. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($2,705,970) + CMHC ($29,909) + FNHA ($664,490) + BC Gaming ($180,825) + Columbia Basin Trust ($692,224) + DFO ($600,000) + Province of BC ($4,252,256) + First Nation GST/FCRSA ($592,292 - treated as government transfer) = $9,718,966; OSR includes property taxes, KDC, KWSC, Kenpesq't LP, and miscellaneous income. expenses_enterprises includes KDC ($69,278), KWSC ($530,197), Kenpesq't Holdings ($57,835), and Kinbasket Property Development ($2,075).
